default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Strategy Sprint Standup to discuss ongoing projects, client updates, and task assignments across the GrowthX team.](https://fathom.video/share/ysi8qkmyP5jfgtHW3xXJTgmzeMKGYGq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Multiple client projects (Town, Engine, Augment Code, Biologica, Hypergrowth) progressing with content strategy, publication assignments, and editorial planning](https://fathom.video/share/ysi8qkmyP5jfgtHW3xXJTgmzeMKGYGq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [New client kickoffs (Airbyte, Innerwell) successful; follow-ups and budget proposals in progress](https://fathom.video/share/ysi8qkmyP5jfgtHW3xXJTgmzeMKGYGq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Team capacity being managed; Aida handling multiple accounts, Jo assisting with research and preparation for upcoming calls](https://fathom.video/share/ysi8qkmyP5jfgtHW3xXJTgmzeMKGYGq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Topics

### Client Updates: Town, Engine, Augment Code

  - [Town: Content artifacts approved, call scheduled for tomorrow, access to CMS (Square) obtained](https://fathom.video/share/ysi8qkmyP5jfgtHW3xXJTgmzeMKGYGq5?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
  - [Engine: Clusters/topics to be sent this week, client on company offsite causing slight delays](https://fathom.video/share/ysi8qkmyP5jfgtHW3xXJTgmzeMKGYGq5?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
  - [Augment Code: Website issues being addressed, preparing for tomorrow's call with 4 execution lanes:](https://fathom.video/share/ysi8qkmyP5jfgtHW3xXJTgmzeMKGYGq5?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
    1.  Editorial/publication: Content OS explanation, calibration article/topics
    2.  Newsletter: Raising subscriber limit, curating publication angles
    3.  AugmentCode.com: Directory integration with Raze
    4.  Design publication for newsletter

### Ongoing Projects: Biologica, Hypergrowth

  - [Biologica: Artifacts under review, assignment generation in progress, meeting scheduled for tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/ysi8qkmyP5jfgtHW3xXJTgmzeMKGYGq5?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [Hypergrowth: Working on publication strategy, considering newsletter pitch, weekly call setup in progress](https://fathom.video/share/ysi8qkmyP5jfgtHW3xXJTgmzeMKGYGq5?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)

### New Client Kickoffs: Airbyte, Innerwell

  - [Airbyte: Kickoff successful, shaping 3 lanes of work, custom budget proposal needed by Wed/Thu](https://fathom.video/share/ysi8qkmyP5jfgtHW3xXJTgmzeMKGYGq5?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [Innerwell: Prior client realigned, focus lanes identified, scoping work in progress](https://fathom.video/share/ysi8qkmyP5jfgtHW3xXJTgmzeMKGYGq5?tab=summary&timestamp=837.0)

### Metronome Project Preparation

  - [Kickoff scheduled for Monday, Jo to prepare agenda and custom discovery questions](https://fathom.video/share/ysi8qkmyP5jfgtHW3xXJTgmzeMKGYGq5?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
  - [Following up for positioning, messaging, ICP, and sales goals documentation](https://fathom.video/share/ysi8qkmyP5jfgtHW3xXJTgmzeMKGYGq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)

### Team Capacity and Task Distribution

  - [Aida managing Town, Biologica, Hypergrowth, and assisting with Augment Code](https://fathom.video/share/ysi8qkmyP5jfgtHW3xXJTgmzeMKGYGq5?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [Jo focusing on Engine, potentially Airbyte, and Metronome preparation](https://fathom.video/share/ysi8qkmyP5jfgtHW3xXJTgmzeMKGYGq5?tab=summary&timestamp=178.0)
  - [Marisol working on code library, MCP servers, and research for Airbyte/Innerwell](https://fathom.video/share/ysi8qkmyP5jfgtHW3xXJTgmzeMKGYGq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [Sadira assisting with Engine backlog and Augment Code assignment setup](https://fathom.video/share/ysi8qkmyP5jfgtHW3xXJTgmzeMKGYGq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Aida to complete Biologica article by Wednesday EOD](https://fathom.video/share/ysi8qkmyP5jfgtHW3xXJTgmzeMKGYGq5?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
  - [Jo to prepare Metronome kickoff materials by Thursday](https://fathom.video/share/ysi8qkmyP5jfgtHW3xXJTgmzeMKGYGq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)
  - [George to follow up with Metronome for additional documentation (ICP, positioning, messaging, USPs)](https://fathom.video/share/ysi8qkmyP5jfgtHW3xXJTgmzeMKGYGq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
  - [Aida and George to discuss publication assignment process after the meeting](https://fathom.video/share/ysi8qkmyP5jfgtHW3xXJTgmzeMKGYGq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [Team to continue work on respective client projects and research tasks](https://fathom.video/share/ysi8qkmyP5jfgtHW3xXJTgmzeMKGYGq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Ongoing communication in Slack for project coordination and updates](https://fathom.video/share/ysi8qkmyP5jfgtHW3xXJTgmzeMKGYGq5?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

action_items.description: Generate assignment for Town. Prep for tomorrow's call + meet head of tax for SME insights
Send clusters & topics for Engine this week. Discuss calibration w/ Panzer re Atlas tomorrow
Scope editorial angles & pub assignments for Augment Code. Meet newsletter co re subscriber limit increase
Summarize top assignments from Augment Code content OS. Share w/ George
Generate assignment for Biologica by EOD Wed
Ping Eric (Metronome) re experience w/ Orb competitor. Note pain points & frustrations
Prep agenda & custom discovery Qs for Metronome kickoff Mon. Finalize by Thu
Follow up w/ Metronome for product marketing materials (ICP, positioning, messaging, USP) & sales goals
Set up columns (keywords, short description, assignment brief) for Augment Code assignments table in Airtable
